title: Entity Resolve Request
description: Input schema for the entity resolver (Phase 3 Step 2). Consumed by lib/entity-resolver.ts and scripts/resolve-entity.ts.

query.description: Human-friendly name to resolve, e.g. "office lights", "kitchen fridge socket"

domain_hint.description: Optional HA domain to prefer when scoring (e.g. "light", "switch", "sensor"). Applied as a +0.05 confidence boost, not a hard filter.

area_hint.description: Optional area name to prefer when scoring (e.g. "Office & Studio"). Applied as a +0.03 confidence boost, not a hard filter.

limit.description: Maximum number of match candidates to return, sorted by confidence descending.

min_confidence.description: Minimum confidence threshold. Matches below this score are excluded from the response. Does not affect exit code — a response with zero matches is still a valid (missing=true) result.
